title: `.git/config` write denied even though allowWrite covers the repo -> {allow, ng} (Denied within allowed)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool, then report its output verbatim (do not summarize, do not run anything else): ( echo x >> wr/.git/config ) 2>err.txt && echo DONE > W5MARK.txt; echo "exit=$?"; cat err.txt
probes.result_text:
Output:
```
exit=1
(eval):1: operation not permitted: wr/.git/config
```

hypothesis: The write to `wr/.git/config` fails and the `&&`-guarded W5MARK is never written; the captured stderr shows the OS-layer denial (Operation not permitted). If W5MARK appears -> ALLOWED (the protection does NOT hold at the sandbox/Bash layer).
